title: IQ-ME methodology page frontmatter
description: Required + optional YAML frontmatter for every src/content/methodology/<lang>/**.md page. Validated at author-time by tools/lint-frontmatter.mjs (Story 4.3).

version.description: Corpus version this page belongs to (semver). Pinned at author-time; bumped per corpus release per NFR25.

lastReviewed.description: ISO 8601 date of last reviewer sign-off (NFR29).

reviewer.description: Human-readable name of the reviewer-of-record for this page (per-language; FR49, NFR29).

reviewerHandle.description: GitHub handle (or @TBD-<lang>-reviewer placeholder) of the reviewer-of-record.

asserts.description: Methodology claims this page asserts. Cross-referenced with src/scoring/irt/METHODOLOGY_CLAIMS.json by lint-claims-manifest.mjs (NFR23).

glossaryRefs.description: camelCase glossary keys referenced in body text (NFR30 glossary-first).

sourceHashEN.description: For RU/PL pages: SHA-256 of the EN-source file this translation was reviewed against (NFR29 stale-translation hatnote). For EN pages: SHA-256 of self (set by build).

protected.description: Optional. True for FR36-protected pages (validity-envelope, anti-credentialization, bottom-decile-care, etc.) — the version-mismatch hatnote always renders for these regardless of corpus-version pin.

slug.description: Optional explicit slug; defaults to file path under src/content/methodology/<lang>/.

pending.description: Optional. True for v0.0.1 placeholder pages awaiting Gate 9a-9e resolution; lint-frontmatter skips strict validation when true.
